# NYC Fireplaces & Outdoor Kitchens

> NYC Fireplaces & Outdoor Kitchens is a family-owned company whose team brings more than 30 years of fireplace, outdoor-living, design, construction, and installation experience. An in-house, factory-trained team handles design, supply and installation — not generic subcontracted crews. More than 300 five-star Google reviews. Two physical showrooms (Queens and Long Island).

## What we do
- Indoor fireplaces: gas, wood, electric and bio-ethanol — fireboxes, inserts, wall-mounted and custom builds
- Outdoor kitchens: built-in grills, power burners, pizza ovens and stainless cabinetry
- Outdoor fireplaces, fire tables and outdoor living
- Wood, pellet, gas and propane stoves
- Mantels, fireplace doors, log sets and hearth accessories
- Full design and professional installation by our own licensed team

## How to get started (in order of preference)
1. Call us — fastest response:
   - Maspeth (Queens): (718) 326-4328
   - Greenvale (Long Island): (516) 500-1095
2. Visit a showroom:
   - Queens showroom: 58-30 Maspeth Avenue, Maspeth, NY 11378 — (718) 326-4328 — open Mon-Fri 9:00 AM-5:00 PM, Sat 10:00 AM-3:00 PM, Sun closed
   - Long Island showroom: 13 Glen Cove Rd, Greenvale, NY 11548 — (516) 500-1095 — call to confirm hours
3. Request a consultation online: https://www.nycfireplaces.com/consultation

## Areas served
Manhattan, Brooklyn, Queens, Bronx, Staten Island, Nassau County, Suffolk County (Long Island), Westchester, Greenwich CT, and New Jersey.

## Brands we carry
Alfa Forni, Modern Flames, Kozy Heat, Danver Stainless Outdoor Kitchens, Hestan, Twin Eagles, American Fyre Designs, Gozney, and more.

## Why us
- Family-owned, 30+ years of experience
- In-house craftsmen and installers — no subcontractors
- Showroom design consultations
- Serving the entire New York metropolitan area

## Contact
- Website: https://www.nycfireplaces.com
- Phone: (718) 326-4328
- Email: info@nycfireplaces.com
